item.title: S'gor to review halal, non-halal waste separation guidelines
item.description: While policy not new, exco acknowledged it has prompted questions on implementation.

item.title: Hamzah officially takes Wawasan Negara's helm
item.description: The party's leadership includes several former Bersatu leaders and politicians of various stripes.

item.title: Amanah concedes Puteri Wangsa to PKR for Johor polls
item.description: State Amanah leader says matter settled after multiple rounds of negotiations.

item.title: Johor facing federal revenue drain, not leakages - regent
item.description: Tunku Ismail wants Putrajaya to return quarter of the revenue collected from Johor.

item.title: Opposition's fractured front, landmark bills await as Dewan Rakyat opens Monday
item.description: With twin elections around the corner, expect 'fireworks' during debates.

item.title: How Johor royals' influence may make naming MB candidate a bad idea for non-BN parties
item.description: History shows such a move may incur state palace's displeasure.

item.title: AI tudung pic sparks DAP fury at MCA, Johor ex-rep warns not to over-appease any community
item.description: DAP chief calls it an 'outdated tactic' and 'dirty game'.

item.title: MACC wins appeals to set aside ruling on malicious process against company director

item.title: Rafizi: The needy shouldn't have to 'beg' for aid, system must facilitate process
item.description: Former minister argues this can be done with rigorous data collection and political will.

item.title: 16 more killed as Israel keeps attacking Lebanon despite US-Iran deal coming into force
item.description: Some people are also missing after strikes on inhabited homes in Nabatieh district.
